title: Profile Radars now available
body: BA, QA, PM, Leadership, Ops, and Sustainment profiles now have custom Radar dashboards with role-specific powers. Activate your profile to see them.

title: Workspace naming convention applied
body: 29 workspaces renamed to follow the new convention: {name}-team, {name}-vertical, sustainment-{studio}. Your settings auto-migrate on next sync.

title: Managed services catalog scoping
body: Workspaces now use managed_studios to scope which catalog apps agents see. Sustainment agents only see your team's applications.
